summary: Iteration 20: Complete frontend testing of new 'Trouvez votre défi' section and refactored EventsPage search module. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: HomePage 'Trouvez votre défi' section displays 7 challenge groups: Running, Autres défis course, Multisport & Fun, Hivernaux & Extrêmes, Obstacles & Fitness, Défis Vélo, Endurance Outdoor
Each challenge uses proper data-testid format: theme-{name}
Challenge 'Trail' click redirects to /events?search=Trail and shows Trail event
Challenge 'Hyrox' click redirects to /events?search=Hyrox and shows 'Aucun événement trouvé' message
Challenge 'Canicross' click shows 'Aucun événement trouvé' with 'Voir tous les événements' button
'Voir tous les événements' button clears filters and shows all 12 events
EventsPage hero section with dark background (bg-asphalt) displays correctly
Glass-morphism search bar (bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl) found in hero
Search input in hero accepts text and filters events
Sport category pills with icons displayed (19 total including 'Tous')
Active filter badges appear when search or sport_type is set
Grid/List view toggle buttons found and functional
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20: 'Trouvez votre défi' section on HomePage has 44 challenges in 7 groups with color-coded headers. Each challenge links to /events?search={name}. EventsPage has new glass-morphism hero search module with sport pills. Challenges without matching events show 'Aucun événement trouvé' with 'Voir tous les événements' button. Preview access: ?preview=SPORTLYO2026.
features_verified: HomePage 'Trouvez votre défi' section with 7 groups and 44 challenges
Challenge groups: Running (8), Autres défis course (7), Multisport & Fun (5), Hivernaux & Extrêmes (3), Obstacles & Fitness (7), Défis Vélo (7), Endurance Outdoor (7)
No events scenario shows 'Aucun événement trouvé' message with CTA button
EventsPage new hero search section with glass-morphism effect
Sport category pills with icons below search bar
Active filter badges with X button to remove
'Tout effacer' button to reset all filters
